title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren advocates for TypeScript over Python for AI development teams, arguing that static type checking via LSPs and compile-time feedback mechanisms prevent costly runtime errors. The video emphasizes that language choice becomes more critical as team size grows and that dynamic languages like Python introduce friction in AI coding workflows.
